utterance: What is the overall field goal percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts
notes: Baseline FG% across entire dataset. FLOAT cast prevents integer division.

utterance: How does 3-point percentage compare to 2-point percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT shot_type, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts GROUP BY shot_type
notes: GROUP BY shot_type gives both 2PT and 3PT percentages side-by-side in one query.

utterance: Which quarter had the highest shooting percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT period, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE period BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY period ORDER BY fg_pct DESC LIMIT 1
notes: GROUP BY period, ordered by FG%, LIMIT 1. BETWEEN 1 AND 4 excludes OT.

utterance: Show all quarters ranked by shooting percentage.
gold_sql: SELECT period, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE period BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY period ORDER BY fg_pct DESC
notes: Turn 2: drops LIMIT 1 to show all 4 quarters ranked. Same aggregation.

utterance: Which players shot better than 50% from the field?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) > 0.50 ORDER BY fg_pct DESC
notes: HAVING clause filters on FG% > 0.50. No minimum attempt threshold — intentionally open to catch all qualifiers including low-volume players.

utterance: Only players with at least 200 attempts.
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) > 0.50 AND COUNT(*) >= 200 ORDER BY fg_pct DESC
notes: Turn 2: adds COUNT(*) >= 200 to HAVING clause. Both conditions must hold — FG% > 50% AND min 200 attempts. SELECT returns name+fg_pct only (attempts is a filter, not a displayed column).

utterance: Who attempted more shots — Tatum or Jaylen Brown?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%' OR p.name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY attempts DESC
notes: Two-player comparison via OR + GROUP BY. ORDER BY DESC makes the higher value appear first.

utterance: Who had the better shooting percentage between them?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%' OR p.name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY fg_pct DESC
notes: Turn 2: same two-player filter; swaps metric to FG%. 'Between them' = same two players from Turn 1.

utterance: Which zone had the highest field goal percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 THEN 'above_break_3' WHEN (x <= -220 AND y <= 90) OR (x >= 220 AND y <= 90) THEN 'corner_3' WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 THEN 'mid_range' ELSE 'other' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts GROUP BY zone ORDER BY fg_pct DESC LIMIT 1
notes: CASE WHEN assigns each shot to a zone; FG% computed per zone. ORDER BY fg_pct DESC LIMIT 1 returns the best zone.

gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 THEN 'above_break_3' WHEN (x <= -220 AND y <= 90) OR (x >= 220 AND y <= 90) THEN 'corner_3' WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 THEN 'mid_range' ELSE 'other' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts GROUP BY zone ORDER BY fg_pct DESC
notes: Turn 2: drops LIMIT 1; adds COUNT(*) as attempts for full context. All zones ranked.

utterance: Were there more made or missed shots overall?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 'made' ELSE 'missed' END as result, COUNT(*) as count FROM shot_charts GROUP BY made_flag ORDER BY count DESC
notes: Simple made vs missed split via CASE WHEN on made_flag. Expected: missed > made (FG% ~48%).

utterance: Which period had the most missed shots?
gold_sql: SELECT period, SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses FROM shot_charts WHERE period BETWEEN 1 AND 4 GROUP BY period ORDER BY misses DESC LIMIT 1
notes: Turn 2: filters to regulation periods; aggregates misses (made_flag = 0) per period. SUM(CASE WHEN) pattern.

utterance: Which player had the most 3-point attempts but the lowest percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as threes_attempted, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE sc.shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY threes_attempted DESC, pct ASC LIMIT 1
notes: Two-criteria ORDER BY: most attempts first (DESC), then lowest % (ASC). LIMIT 1 finds the player with most volume but worst efficiency. Interesting NL phrasing requiring compound sort.

utterance: How does paint FG% compare to mid-range FG%?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 THEN 'mid_range' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190) OR (distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22) GROUP BY zone
notes: Two-zone comparison. WHERE clause limits to only the two zones being compared before GROUP BY.

utterance: Did Tatum shoot better in Q1 or Q4?
gold_sql: SELECT period, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND period IN (1, 4) GROUP BY period ORDER BY period
notes: Player subquery + period IN (1,4) + GROUP BY period. Returns Q1 and Q4 FG% for Tatum to compare directly.

utterance: Which of the top 3 shooters had the best paint percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as paint_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE p.name IN ('Jayson Tatum','Jaylen Brown','Derrick White') AND ABS(sc.x) <= 80 AND sc.y <= 190 GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY paint_pct DESC LIMIT 1
notes: 'Top 3 shooters' resolved from prior context (Tatum, J.Brown, White by attempt count). Paint zone + FG% + LIMIT 1.

utterance: How many players averaged more than 5 shots per game?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM shot_charts) as shots_per_game FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id GROUP BY p.name HAVING CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM shot_charts) > 5 ORDER BY shots_per_game DESC
notes: Subquery for total game count used as denominator. HAVING on computed per-game average. Tests nested subquery in HAVING.

utterance: Which was higher — 3-point volume or 2-point volume?
gold_sql: SELECT shot_type, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts GROUP BY shot_type ORDER BY attempts DESC
notes: Simple volume comparison by shot_type. Verified: 3PT=3482, 2PT=3914 — 2PT higher by volume. Tests NL 'which was higher' → ORDER BY DESC.
